title.en: Another Origin Upper Realm Overlord asked.

content.en:
Regarding the proposal of the temples ancestor, the Yazu of the reincarnation heavenly clan did not dare to agree.

"Ancestor of the Temples, there is something going on in the origin of the Reincarnation Domain, and your Reincarnation Clan is the most affected, so you are naturally eager to solve it and even dare to take risks. However, what if they anger the being who is above the Overlord of the Origin Upper Realm, and attack us?"

Yazu asked.

The other Origin Upper Realm Overlords also nodded their heads, they were also worried about this issue.

The Sideburn Ancestor pondered for a while and said, "The existence that surpasses the Overlord of the Origin Upper Realm may not be able to enter. Before, the Blood Raven Ancestor angered the other party, but after he returned, he was not killed. If it weren't for the Blood Raven Ancestor not re-entering that forbidden area, he would have lived a little longer. Therefore, there is a high probability that the other party will not be able to enter. Moreover, after the half-step breakthrough of the ancestor, he cut off a fragment of the prison, which did not attract retaliation. So, they shouldn't be able to get in. "

"Who can guarantee that they really won't be able to get in?"

Another Origin Upper Realm Overlord asked.

"Ladies and gentlemen, if we take the risk and give it a try, we may be able to get a glimpse of the truth and secrets, and possibly step into the realm above the Overlord of the Origin Upper Realm. If you keep being so timid, you will die at the hands of the one outside the prison one day!" said the temples again.

"We've got to think about it!"

Junzu said.

The other Origin Upper Realm Overlords also thought the same way, so they still had to wait and see, and they were not in a hurry to respond.

Then, they discussed for a while, but there was still no result, and then they left one by one.

......

"The energy of the Reincarnation Domain and the Land of Eternity is declining faster and faster!"

Ye Tian frowned slightly.

He felt that something was absorbing the origin of places such as the Reincarnation Domain and the Land of Eternity.

Moreover, the high-level of the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan seemed to know something, but his Ao Chen's physical strength and cultivation were still not high, so he couldn't participate in it, so he didn't know the specific situation at present.

So, he can only continue to wait for now.

Before you know it, tens of millions of primeval years have passed.

At this time.

The energy of the Reincarnation Domain has dropped five times compared to the past, and the origin of the Reincarnation Domain is already scarce, and many Origin Upper Realm Overlords are unable to continue to break through, and the difficulty of breaking through is more than ten times greater.

Even the Heavenly Ancestor of the Origin Realm of the Tianshan Pavilion, if he wanted to break through, it was many times more difficult.

In the past, they impacted higher realms, such as the Origin Middle Realm Heavenly Ancestor impacting the Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor, and during the breakthrough process, there was also the Origin of the Eternal Shore to help them break through, but now the Origin of the Eternal Shore is extremely weak, where can they help break through!

This makes it too difficult to break through!

......

Reincarnation Heavenly Ancestor.

Yazu and they all panicked, if they continue like this, I am afraid that none of the members of the entire Reincarnation Heavenly Clan will be able to continue to break through, so if it goes on like this, what is it?

"Agree with the suggestion of the reincarnation clan, otherwise if this continues, the reincarnation domain will inevitably be chaotic, and even the three clans will have to break out contradictions, fighting for resources, it is better to fight!"

Yazu said.

"Then agree!"

The other nine awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords nodded.

On the other side, the reincarnation source clan also agreed.

As a result, the high-level leaders of the three clans began to study such a formation, and the ordinary formation would definitely not work, and to create the kind of formation that could tear apart the depths of the origin of the reincarnation domain, it would definitely not be enough to rely on a nine-time awakening Origin Upper Realm overlord, and all the Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm overlords would need to come over to study.

However, after a while, they felt that it would be a little helpful to let those Seventh- or Eighth-Awakened Origin Upper Realm Overlords also participate.

And so.

Ye Tian's Aochen copy body was recruited.

When Ye Tian officially joined, he knew the plans and intentions of the three clans of the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan, the Reincarnation Source Clan, and the Reincarnation Clan, and the specific information also left one by one.

"Prison!"

"Beyond the existence above the Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords!"

"The origin of the reincarnation domain has been sucked away!"

Ye Tianming came to his senses.

The Reincarnation Domain, the Ruins of Reincarnation, and the Land of Eternity are all just areas inside the prison, and now that there is an accident inside the prison, the three clans are panicking, wanting to break the prison and seek the truth, and they don't want to sit still.

But outside the prison, there is definitely an existence beyond the Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords, and there may even be more than one, and the ideas of the three clans are very bold, and if they are not careful, they will all be destroyed.

But if that kind of existence can't enter the reincarnation realm, then nothing will happen to the behavior of the three clans.

"Prison!" Ye Tian thought of the Origin Ancestor, the Origin Ancestor may know more about the situation, but he did not pass on the news, perhaps the original Origin Ancestor was also extremely desperate, and felt that the latecomers could not compete with the other party, so he did not pass on the information.

"If there is a force outside the prison, this force must have some plans for this, and now that the origin is being consumed a lot, it may be their plan. Will this plot destroy the realm of reincarnation, the land of eternity?"

This is not only a problem that Ye Tian is worried about, but also a problem that the three reincarnation clans are worried about.

Another period of time has passed.

Ye Tian and the high-level members of the three clans of reincarnation have been creating formations, and each of them has a clear division of labor and creates little by little.

In the blink of an eye, 300 million primeval years have passed.

After such a long period of research, using so many Origin Upper Realm Overlords and many deduction treasures, they finally created a very terrifying formation.

"Prison Breaker!"

This formation requires more than thirty powerhouses of the level of the Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords to do it, and it also needs more than 10,000 Origin Upper Realm Overlords to urge it together before it can be stimulated.

And arranging this formation also requires countless top-notch resources, but fortunately, the three reincarnation clans have abundant resources, so they can be obtained.

"Let's start the formation!"

Yazu: They have taken action.

This prison breaking array, just arranged, I am afraid it will take hundreds of thousands of primeval eras.

......

"The origin of the reincarnation domain and the land on the other side of eternity is only one-tenth of the original, and the energy of the entire land on the other side of eternity is only one-twentieth of the original, and many cultivators have been unable to break the realm, since the hundreds of millions of primeval eras, except for the birth of a Origin Upper Realm Overlord in the Tianshan Pavilion, no others have been born, not even a Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor has been born. "

Ye Tian muttered.

This is not only the case in the land on the other side of eternity, but also on the other side of the reincarnation domain, and the most miserable is the reincarnation clan, where many Origin Upper Realm overlords have fallen to the realm.

"After consuming so many resources, my cultivation has finally reached the sixth balance realm. The progress of the Supreme Dao rules is slow, but it is still a little bit better, and now I have to hit the seventh balance realm, I don't know if I can break through successfully?"

If it was before, he had a 100% success rate in breaking through, but now it's hard to say.

If there were no Supreme Dao rules, it would be almost impossible for him to break through, but now with the Supreme Dao Rules, there is hope for a breakthrough!
